div.p: Connect Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, Gemini and other AI clients to your Odoo data.

i.class: fa fa-lock fa-3x text-muted mb-3 d-block

div.h5: Sign in to connect your AI client
div.p: Create an API key, copy your config and start using Odoo tools in Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT and more.

span.class: badge rounded-pill bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2
badge rounded-pill bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2
badge rounded-pill bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2
badge rounded-pill bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2
badge rounded-pill bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2
badge rounded-pill bg-primary bg-opacity-10 text-primary px-3 py-2

tr.td: Paste URL in Apps → New App

div.label: MCP Server Name *
div.div: Short slug used in AI client config files.

button.class: btn btn-primary

t.div: No keys yet — create your first key above.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary

form.onsubmit: return confirm('Regenerate this key? The old key stops working immediately.')

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary

form.onsubmit: return confirm('Revoke this key? It will stop working immediately.')

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger

div.div: Paste this URL in ChatGPT → Apps → New App → Server URL. Auth: No Auth.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.p: Replace [YOUR_KEY]. Requires public URL (Odoo.sh / ngrok — not localhost).

div.div: Run once in your terminal. Claude Code saves it permanently.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.p: Replace [YOUR_KEY] and [SERVER-NAME]. Lost key? Use Regenerate above.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.p: Replace [YOUR_KEY]. Reload VS Code after saving.

div.div: ① Empty config — paste this full block:

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.div: ② Already has other servers — add only this entry inside mcpServers{}, comma after the previous entry:

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.p: Replace [YOUR_KEY]. No trailing comma on last entry. Requires Node.js.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.div: Python bridge — loads all 25 Odoo tools into any OpenAI-compatible call.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

div.pre:
# pip install openai mcp import asyncio from mcp import ClientSession from mcp.client.streamable_http import streamablehttp_client from openai import OpenAI
MCP_URL = "/mcp/v1?key=[YOUR_KEY]"
async def get_tools(): async with streamablehttp_client(MCP_URL) as (r, w, _): async with ClientSession(r, w) as s: await s.initialize() return (await s.list_tools()).tools
tools = asyncio.run(get_tools()) oai_tools = [{"type": "function", "function": { "name": t.name, "description": t.description, "parameters": t.inputSchema}} for t in tools]
client = OpenAI() # OPENAI_API_KEY env var response = client.chat.completions.create( model="gpt-4o", tools=oai_tools, messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Your question here"}] )

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.class: alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-3

div.span: Copy or download your configs now — the plain key is shown only once.

div.div: Save this key now — it cannot be retrieved again. Use Download Config below to save everything to a file.

pre.class: bg-dark text-warning rounded p-3 mb-2 fw-bold

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2
btn btn-primary btn-sm

div.p: No file to edit. Open ChatGPT → Apps → New App → paste the URL below → Auth: No Auth → Create.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

ol.li: Go to chatgpt.com → left sidebar → Apps
Click New App → name it Odoo
Connection → Server URL tab → paste URL above
Authentication → No Auth → check warning → Create

div.p: Run once in your terminal. Works in any directory forever after.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

ol.li: Run the command above once in terminal
Open Claude Code: claude — ask about your Odoo data

div.p: Add to .cursor/mcp.json in project root or ~/.cursor/mcp.json globally.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

ol.li: Restart Cursor → type @ in Cursor Chat

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

ol.li: Install Continue extension in VS Code / JetBrains
Open ~/.continue/config.json → add entry above inside mcpServers array
Reload VS Code: Ctrl+Shift+P → Developer: Reload Window

div.p: Uses mcp-remote as a stdio bridge. Requires Node.js (node -v to check).
div.div: ① File is empty — paste this full block:

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.div: ② Already has other servers — add only this entry inside mcpServers{}, comma after the previous entry:

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-0

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

ol.li: Use ① or ② above depending on your file
No trailing comma on the last entry — causes parse error
Fully quit and reopen Claude Desktop (Cmd+Q / Alt+F4)

div.class: alert alert-danger py-2 small mt-2 mb-0

div.div: Common mistake: trailing comma after the last entry crashes the app.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.p: Create opencode.json in project root. Install: npm install -g opencode-ai

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2

div.p: Loads all Odoo MCP tools into any OpenAI-compatible call. Works with localhost too.

pre.class: bg-dark text-light rounded p-3 small mb-2

div.pre:
# pip install openai mcp import asyncio from mcp import ClientSession from mcp.client.streamable_http import streamablehttp_client from openai import OpenAI
MCP_URL = "?key="
async def get_tools(): async with streamablehttp_client(MCP_URL) as (r, w, _): async with ClientSession(r, w) as s: await s.initialize() return (await s.list_tools()).tools
tools = asyncio.run(get_tools()) oai_tools = [{"type": "function", "function": { "name": t.name, "description": t.description, "parameters": t.inputSchema}} for t in tools]
client = OpenAI() # set OPENAI_API_KEY env var response = client.chat.completions.create( model="gpt-4o", tools=oai_tools, messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Search for top 5 customers"}] )

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2
